title: hieracium juranum subsp. pseudojuranum
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. pseudojuranum, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plants family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Hieracium juranum subsp. pseudojuranum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its bitter compounds. Herbal preparations of Hieracium juranum subsp. pseudojuranum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
